Made by Africans, for Africans

Your roots
are calling.

Learn Yoruba, Igbo, and Edo the way it was meant to feel — personal, cultural, and alive. Koyo brings you home, one word at a time.

🍎 App Store ▶ Google Play

What is Koyo?

Language is never
just language.

Most apps teach you what a word means. Koyo teaches you what it feels like to use it — the right greeting for an elder, what to say when you walk into someone's home, the phrase that makes your grandmother smile because you finally got it right.

Every lesson is built with cultural context, so you're not just learning a language. You're learning how to belong in a conversation.

Who We Are & Why We Built This

Built with purpose.
Driven by identity.

🌍 Our Mission

Empowering Africans to rediscover and embrace who they are.

We exist to empower Africans to rediscover and embrace their native languages, promote culture, and strengthen communities — one lesson, one word, one conversation at a time.

Language is identity.
✨ Our Vision

Bringing Africans back to their roots. One language at a time.

We imagine a world where no African has to feel like a stranger in their own mother tongue. Where the language of your grandparents is the language of your future.

The future speaks African.

Available Now

3 Nigerian Languages.
Taught the right way.

🔴
Yoruba
"E kaaro" — Good morning

Spoken by over 40 million people across Nigeria, Benin, and the diaspora. Rich in proverbs, tones, and warmth.

🟢
Igbo
"Nnọọ" — Welcome

One of Nigeria's most expressive languages. Deep cultural roots, vibrant communities, and stories in every syllable.

🟠
Edo
"Kpẹle" — Hello

The language of the ancient Benin Kingdom. Learn the tongue of kings, artists, and a proud, enduring heritage.

More Nigerian — and African — languages coming soon

What's Inside

Built for real life.
Not just a screen.

🎧
Real Audio, Real Accents

Hear the language the way it's actually spoken — not robotic, not rehearsed. Because how a word sounds is just as important as what it means.

⚡
Bite-Sized Daily Lessons

Five minutes while you're commuting, waiting, or winding down. Short, focused, and designed to actually stick — no overwhelm, ever.

🔁
Smart Repetition

Koyo tracks what you're forgetting and brings it back at just the right moment — so you stop re-learning the same things over and over.

📖
Cultural Insights Built In

Understand not just what to say, but when and why. Every lesson carries the story behind the words — the traditions, the meaning, the moments.

On the Roadmap

We're just getting started.

Here's what we're building next. Download now and you'll have it all as it arrives.

🔥
Daily Streaks

Build your habit. Track your consistency. Keep the momentum going.

Coming 2025
🏅
Badges & Milestones

Earn rewards for every step forward — because progress deserves to be celebrated.

Coming 2025
🎮
Gamified Challenges

Leaderboards, timed quizzes, and community challenges. Learning meets play.

Coming 2025
🌍
More Languages

More Nigerian, then more African. We're going deep before we go wide.

Coming 2025
